item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 posted a narrow gain on Tuesday as losses in software stocks weighed on the market.

item.title: Third Point opens positions in Spotify and Chipotle, doubles stake in train stock Union Pacific
item.description: The Spotify and Chipotle buys came amid rough quarters for the stocks.

item.title: Ackman's Pershing Square bet big on Amazon in fourth quarter
item.description: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square poured hundreds of millions of dollars into Amazon shares as 2025 wrapped up.

item.title: David Tepper adds to big Micron position, gets bullish on Korean stocks
item.description: The billionaire investor boosted his stake in Micron by 200%, meaning the memory maker crucial to AI systems is now the fund's fourth-largest holding.

item.title: We may be on the cusp of a new industrial cycle, says Bank of America. How to play it — and score attractive yields
item.description: Bank of America sees opportunity for income as industrial growth takes off.
